debug_info.goal:
r : ℝ
hr : r ≠ 0
f : ℂ → ℂ
h : MeromorphicOn f ⊤
this :
  MeasureTheory.AEStronglyMeasurable (fun x => log ‖f (circleMap 0 r x.1) - circleMap 0 1 x.2‖)
    ((MeasureTheory.volume.restrict (Ioc 0 (2 * Real.pi))).prod (MeasureTheory.volume.restrict (Ioc 0 (2 * Real.pi))))
τ₁ :
  (∀ᶠ (y : ℝ) in MeasureTheory.ae MeasureTheory.volume ⊓ principal (Ioc 0 (2 * Real.pi)),
        MeasureTheory.Integrable (fun x => log ‖f (circleMap 0 r x) - circleMap 0 1 y‖)
          (MeasureTheory.volume.restrict (Ioc 0 (2 * Real.pi)))) ∧
      MeasureTheory.Integrable
        (fun y => ∫ (x : ℝ) in Ioc 0 (2 * Real.pi), |log ‖f (circleMap 0 r x) - circleMap 0 1 y‖|)
        (MeasureTheory.volume.restrict (Ioc 0 (2 * Real.pi))) ↔
    (∀ᶠ (x : ℝ) in MeasureTheory.ae MeasureTheory.volume ⊓ principal (Ioc 0 (2 * Real.pi)),
        MeasureTheory.Integrable (fun y => log ‖f (circleMap 0 r x) - circleMap 0 1 y‖)
          (MeasureTheory.volume.restrict (Ioc 0 (2 * Real.pi)))) ∧
      MeasureTheory.Integrable
        (fun x => ∫ (y : ℝ) in Ioc 0 (2 * Real.pi), |log ‖f (circleMap 0 r x) - circleMap 0 1 y‖|)
        (MeasureTheory.volume.restrict (Ioc 0 (2 * Real.pi)))
a : ℝ
⊢ MeromorphicOn (fun x => f (circleMap 0 r x) - circleMap 0 1 a) (uIcc 0 (2 * Real.pi))

proof:
have hf : MeromorphicOn (fun x ↦ f (circleMap 0 r x)) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro x hx
        have : MeromorphicAt f (circleMap 0 r x) := h (circleMap 0 r x) trivial
        exact this.comp_analyticAt (by
          have hcm := analyticOnNhd_circleMap (0 : ℂ) r
          exact hcm x trivial)
      have hg : MeromorphicOn (fun x ↦ circleMap 0 1 a) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro x hx
        simpa using (meromorphicAt_const : MeromorphicAt (fun _ : ℝ ↦ (circleMap (0 : ℂ) 1 a)) x)
      exact hf.sub hg
failed_attempts:
have hf' : MeromorphicOn (fun x ↦ f (circleMap 0 r x)) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro x hx
        have : MeromorphicAt f (circleMap 0 r x) := h (circleMap 0 r x) trivial
        refine this.comp ?_
        exact (analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 r x trivial).meromorphicAt
      have hg' : MeromorphicOn (fun x ↦ circleMap 0 1 a) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro x hx
        simpa using (AnalyticAt.meromorphicAt (analyticAt_const : AnalyticAt ℂ (fun _ : ℝ ↦ circleMap 0 1 a) x))
      exact hf'.sub hg'
    have := intervalIntegrable_log_norm_meromorphicOn (a := 0) (b := 2 * π)
        (f := fun x ↦ f (circleMap 0 r x) - circleMap 0 1 a) z₀
    unfold IntervalIntegrable at this
    simp at this
    unfold MeasureTheory.IntegrableOn at this
    exact this.1

have hf' : MeromorphicOn (fun x ↦ f (circleMap 0 r x)) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro x hx
        have hf0 : MeromorphicAt f (circleMap 0 r x) := h (circleMap 0 r x) trivial
        refine hf0.comp _ ?_
        have han : AnalyticAt ℝ (circleMap 0 r) x := by
          have hnhd := analyticOnNhd_circleMap (0 : ℂ) r
          exact (hnhd x trivial).analyticAt
        exact han.meromorphicAt
      have hg' : MeromorphicOn (fun x ↦ circleMap 0 1 a) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro x hx
        refine AnalyticAt.meromorphicAt ?_
        fun_prop
      exact hf'.sub hg'

refine (h.comp ?_).sub ?_
      · have hcm : AnalyticOnNhd ℂ (circleMap 0 r) ⊤ := analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 r
        exact hcm.meromorphicOn
      · have hcm1 : AnalyticOnNhd ℂ (fun x : ℂ ↦ circleMap 0 1 a) ⊤ := by
          simpa using (analyticOnNhd_const : AnalyticOnNhd ℂ (fun _ : ℂ ↦ circleMap 0 1 a) ⊤)
        exact hcm1.meromorphicOn

have hf' : MeromorphicOn (fun x ↦ f (circleMap 0 r x)) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro x hx
        have : (fun x ↦ f (circleMap 0 r x)) = f ∘ circleMap 0 r := rfl
        rw [this]
        refine (h (circleMap 0 r x) trivial).comp ?_
        exact (analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 r x trivial).meromorphicAt
      have hg' : MeromorphicOn (fun x ↦ circleMap 0 1 a) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro x hx
        simpa using (meromorphicAt_const : MeromorphicAt (fun _ : ℝ ↦ circleMap 0 1 a) x)
      simpa [sub_eq_add_neg] using hf'.add hg'.neg

refine (h.meromorphicOn.comp ?_).sub ?_
      · intro x hx
        simpa using (analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 r x trivial).meromorphicAt
      · intro x hx
        simpa using (analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 1 x trivial).meromorphicAt

refine (h.mono ?_).sub ?_
      · intro z hz
        trivial
      · have hcircle : AnalyticOnNhd ℝ (fun x : ℝ ↦ circleMap 0 1 a) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
          simpa [AnalyticOnNhd] using
            (analyticOnNhd_const : AnalyticOnNhd ℝ (fun _ : ℝ ↦ circleMap 0 1 a) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)))
        exact hcircle.meromorphicOn

have hf : MeromorphicOn (fun x ↦ f (circleMap 0 r x)) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro x hx
        have : MeromorphicAt f (circleMap 0 r x) := h (circleMap 0 r x) trivial
        refine this.comp_analyticAt ?_
        have hcm := analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 r
        exact (hcm x trivial).analyticAt
      have hg : MeromorphicOn (fun x ↦ circleMap 0 1 a) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro x hx
        simpa using (AnalyticAt.meromorphicAt (by fun_prop) : MeromorphicAt (fun _ : ℝ ↦ circleMap 0 1 a) x)
      exact hf.sub hg

refine (h.sub ?_).mono ?_
      · intro z hz
        refine AnalyticAt.meromorphicAt ?_
        have hc : AnalyticOnNhd ℝ (circleMap (0 : ℂ) 1) Set.univ := analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 1
        exact (hc z trivial)
      · intro z hz
        trivial

intro x hx
      refine (h (circleMap 0 r x) trivial).comp_analyticAt.sub ?_
      refine AnalyticAt.meromorphicAt ?_
      have hc := analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 1
      exact hc x trivial

intro x hx
      refine (h (circleMap 0 r x) trivial).sub ?_
      refine (AnalyticAt.meromorphicAt ?_)
      have ha := analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 1
      exact ha x trivial

intro x hx
      have hf : MeromorphicAt f (circleMap 0 r x) := h (circleMap 0 r x) trivial
      have hcomp : MeromorphicAt (fun x ↦ f (circleMap 0 r x)) x :=
        hf.comp_analyticAt (by
          have hc := analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 r
          exact (hc x trivial))
      have hconst : MeromorphicAt (fun _ : ℝ ↦ (circleMap 0 1 a : ℂ)) x :=
        (analyticAt_const : AnalyticAt (fun _ : ℝ ↦ (circleMap 0 1 a : ℂ)) x).meromorphicAt
      simpa [MeromorphicOn, Function.comp] using hcomp.sub hconst

refine (h.comp ?_).sub ?_
      · have hc : MapsTo (circleMap 0 r) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) ⊤ := by
          intro x hx
          trivial
        exact (analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 r).meromorphicOn hc
      · have hc : MapsTo (fun x : ℝ ↦ circleMap 0 1 a) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) ⊤ := by
          intro x hx
          trivial
        exact (analyticOnNhd_const : AnalyticOnNhd ℝ (fun _ : ℝ ↦ circleMap 0 1 a) ⊤).meromorphicOn hc

refine (h.sub ?_).mono ?_
      · intro x hx
        refine AnalyticAt.meromorphicAt ?_
        have hc := analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 1
        exact (hc x trivial)
      · intro x hx
        simp

refine (h.mono ?_).sub ?_
      · intro x hx
        trivial
      · exact (analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 1).meromorphicOn.mono (by intro x hx; trivial)

refine (h.comp ?_).sub ?_
      · exact (analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 r).mono (by intro x hx; trivial)
      · refine (AnalyticOnNhd.meromorphicOn ?_).mono (by intro x hx; trivial)
        exact analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 1
successful_attempts:
have hf : MeromorphicOn (fun x ↦ f (circleMap 0 r x)) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro x hx
        have : MeromorphicAt f (circleMap 0 r x) := h (circleMap 0 r x) trivial
        exact this.comp_analyticAt (by
          have hcm := analyticOnNhd_circleMap (0 : ℂ) r
          exact hcm x trivial)
      have hg : MeromorphicOn (fun x ↦ circleMap 0 1 a) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro x hx
        simpa using (meromorphicAt_const : MeromorphicAt (fun _ : ℝ ↦ (circleMap (0 : ℂ) 1 a)) x)
      exact hf.sub hg

have hf' : MeromorphicOn (fun x ↦ f (circleMap 0 r x)) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro x hx
        have : MeromorphicAt f (circleMap 0 r x) := h (circleMap 0 r x) trivial
        exact this.comp_analyticAt (by
          have hc := analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 r
          exact (hc x trivial))
      have hg' : MeromorphicOn (fun x ↦ circleMap 0 1 a) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro x hx
        exact (AnalyticAt.meromorphicAt (by fun_prop))
      exact hf'.sub hg'

intro x hx
      have hf' : MeromorphicAt (fun x ↦ f (circleMap 0 r x)) x := by
        have : (fun x ↦ f (circleMap 0 r x)) = f ∘ (circleMap 0 r) := by
          rfl
        rw [this]
        refine (h (circleMap 0 r x) trivial).comp_analyticAt ?_
        have := analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 r
        exact this x trivial
      have hg' : MeromorphicAt (fun x ↦ circleMap 0 1 a) x := by
        simpa using (meromorphicAt_const : MeromorphicAt (fun _ : ℝ ↦ (circleMap 0 1 a : ℂ)) x)
      exact hf'.sub hg'

have hf : MeromorphicOn (fun x ↦ f (circleMap 0 r x)) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro x hx
        have : MeromorphicAt (fun z ↦ f z) (circleMap 0 r x) :=
          (h (circleMap 0 r x) trivial)
        exact this.comp_analyticAt (by
          have hc := analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 r
          exact (hc x trivial))
      have hg : MeromorphicOn (fun x ↦ circleMap 0 1 a) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro x hx
        refine AnalyticAt.meromorphicAt ?_
        fun_prop
      simpa [MeromorphicOn] using hf.sub hg

have hf : MeromorphicOn (fun x ↦ f (circleMap 0 r x)) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro x hx
        have hf' : MeromorphicAt f (circleMap 0 r x) := h (circleMap 0 r x) trivial
        have ha : AnalyticAt ℝ (circleMap 0 r) x := by
          have hOn := analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 r
          exact (hOn x trivial)
        exact hf'.comp_analyticAt ha
      have hg : MeromorphicOn (fun x ↦ circleMap 0 1 a) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro x hx
        simpa using (meromorphicAt_const : MeromorphicAt (fun _ : ℝ ↦ circleMap 0 1 a) x)
      exact hf.sub hg

intro x hx
      have hf' : MeromorphicAt (fun x ↦ f (circleMap 0 r x)) x := by
        have : (fun x ↦ f (circleMap 0 r x)) = f ∘ (circleMap 0 r) := by
          rfl
        rw [this]
        exact (h (circleMap 0 r x) trivial).comp_analyticAt (by
          have hc := analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 r
          exact (hc x trivial))
      have hg' : MeromorphicAt (fun x ↦ circleMap 0 1 a) x := by
        simpa using (AnalyticAt.meromorphicAt (by fun_prop : AnalyticAt (fun _ : ℝ ↦ circleMap 0 1 a) x))
      simpa [MeromorphicOn, hf', hg'] using hf'.sub hg'

have hf : MeromorphicOn (fun x : ℝ ↦ f (circleMap 0 r x)) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro x hx
        have : MeromorphicAt f (circleMap 0 r x) := h (circleMap 0 r x) trivial
        exact this.comp_analyticAt (by
          have hc := analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 r
          exact hc x trivial)
      have hg : MeromorphicOn (fun x : ℝ ↦ circleMap 0 1 a) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro x hx
        simpa using (meromorphicAt_const : MeromorphicAt (fun _ : ℝ ↦ circleMap 0 1 a) x)
      exact hf.sub hg

intro x hx
      have hf' : MeromorphicAt (fun x ↦ f (circleMap 0 r x)) x := by
        have : (fun x ↦ f (circleMap 0 r x)) = f ∘ (circleMap 0 r) := rfl
        rw [this]
        apply (h (circleMap 0 r x) trivial).comp_analyticAt
        have hc := analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 r
        exact hc x trivial
      have hg' : MeromorphicAt (fun x ↦ circleMap 0 1 a) x := by
        simpa using (meromorphicAt_const : MeromorphicAt (fun _ : ℝ ↦ circleMap 0 1 a) x)
      exact hf'.sub hg'

have hf : MeromorphicOn (fun x ↦ f (circleMap 0 r x)) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro x hx
        have : MeromorphicAt (fun z ↦ f z) (circleMap 0 r x) := h (circleMap 0 r x) trivial
        refine this.comp_analyticAt ?_
        have hc := analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 r
        exact (hc x trivial)
      have hg : AnalyticOnNhd ℝ (fun x ↦ circleMap 0 1 a) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        refine (analyticOnNhd_const : AnalyticOnNhd ℝ (fun _ : ℝ ↦ circleMap 0 1 a) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)))
      simpa using hf.sub (hg.meromorphicOn)

have hf' : MeromorphicOn (fun x ↦ f (circleMap 0 r x)) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro x hx
        have : MeromorphicAt f (circleMap 0 r x) := h (circleMap 0 r x) trivial
        have han : AnalyticAt ℝ (fun t ↦ circleMap 0 r t) x := by
          have hOn := analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 r
          exact hOn x trivial
        exact this.comp_analyticAt han
      have hg' : MeromorphicOn (fun x ↦ circleMap 0 1 a) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro x hx
        refine AnalyticAt.meromorphicAt ?_
        fun_prop
      exact hf'.sub hg'

intro x hx
      have hf' : MeromorphicAt (fun x ↦ f (circleMap 0 r x)) x := by
        have : (fun x ↦ f (circleMap 0 r x)) = f ∘ circleMap 0 r := rfl
        rw [this]
        apply (h (circleMap 0 r x) trivial).comp_analyticAt
        have hc := analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 r
        exact hc x trivial
      have hg' : MeromorphicAt (fun x ↦ circleMap 0 1 a) x := by
        refine AnalyticAt.meromorphicAt ?_
        fun_prop
      exact hf'.sub hg'

have hf' : MeromorphicOn (fun x ↦ f (circleMap 0 r x)) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro x hx
        have hf0 : MeromorphicAt f (circleMap 0 r x) := h (circleMap 0 r x) trivial
        exact hf0.comp_analyticAt (by
          have hc := analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 r
          exact (hc x trivial))
      have hg' : AnalyticOnNhd ℝ (fun x ↦ circleMap 0 1 a) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        refine analyticOnNhd_const
      exact hf'.sub hg'.meromorphicOn

intro x hx
      have hf' : MeromorphicAt (fun x ↦ f (circleMap 0 r x)) x := by
        have : (fun x ↦ f (circleMap 0 r x)) = f ∘ (circleMap 0 r) := rfl
        rw [this]
        exact (h (circleMap 0 r x) trivial).comp_analyticAt (by
          have hc := analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 r
          exact hc x trivial)
      have hg' : MeromorphicAt (fun x ↦ circleMap 0 1 a) x := by
        simpa using (meromorphicAt_const : MeromorphicAt (fun _ : ℝ ↦ (circleMap 0 1 a : ℂ)) x)
      exact hf'.sub hg'

have hf' : MeromorphicOn (fun x ↦ f (circleMap 0 r x)) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro x hx
        have hf : MeromorphicAt f (circleMap 0 r x) := h (circleMap 0 r x) trivial
        have hc : AnalyticAt ℝ (circleMap (0:ℂ) r) x := by
          have := analyticOnNhd_circleMap (0:ℂ) r
          exact this x trivial
        exact (hf.comp_analyticAt hc)
      have hg' : MeromorphicOn (fun x ↦ circleMap 0 1 a) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro x hx
        refine AnalyticAt.meromorphicAt ?_
        fun_prop
      simpa [sub_eq_add_neg] using hf'.add hg'.neg

intro x hx
      have hf : MeromorphicAt (fun x ↦ f (circleMap 0 r x)) x := by
        have : (fun x ↦ f (circleMap 0 r x)) = f ∘ circleMap 0 r := rfl
        rw [this]
        exact (h (circleMap 0 r x) trivial).comp_analyticAt (by
          have := analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 r
          exact this x trivial)
      have hg : MeromorphicAt (fun x ↦ circleMap 0 1 a) x := by
        simpa using (meromorphicAt_const : MeromorphicAt (fun _ : ℝ ↦ (circleMap 0 1 a : ℂ)) x)
      exact hf.sub hg

have hf : MeromorphicOn (fun x ↦ f (circleMap 0 r x)) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro x hx
        have hf0 : MeromorphicAt f (circleMap 0 r x) := h (circleMap 0 r x) trivial
        have hc : AnalyticAt ℝ (circleMap 0 r) x := by
          have := analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 r
          exact (this x trivial)
        exact hf0.comp_analyticAt hc
      have hg : MeromorphicOn (fun x ↦ circleMap 0 1 a) (uIcc 0 (2 * π)) := by
        intro x hx
        simpa using (meromorphicAt_const : MeromorphicAt (fun _ : ℝ ↦ circleMap 0 1 a) x)
      exact hf.sub hg
